heading: Definitions
label: 50301 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15231 of Title 42

Short TitleFor short title of , which is classified to this chapter, as the “Law Enforcement Congressional Badge of Bravery Act of 2008”, see , set out as a Short Title of 2008 Act note under .Pub. L. 110–298section 1 of Pub. L. 110–298section 10101 of this title

children.heading: Federal agency head
children.label: 1 Federal agency head
children.text: The term “Federal agency head” means the head of any executive, legislative, or judicial branch Government entity that employs Federal law enforcement officers.

children.heading: Federal Board
children.label: 2 Federal Board
children.text: The term “Federal Board” means the Federal Law Enforcement Congressional Badge of Bravery Board established under .section 50313(a) of this title

children.heading: Federal Board members
children.label: 3 Federal Board members
children.text: The term “Federal Board members” means the members of the Federal Board appointed under .section 50313(c) of this title

children.heading: Federal Law Enforcement Badge
children.label: 4 Federal Law Enforcement Badge
children.text: The term “Federal Law Enforcement Badge” means the Federal Law Enforcement Congressional Badge of Bravery described in .section 50311 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: who has statutory authority to make arrests or apprehensions;

children.label: ii
children.text: who is authorized by the agency of the employee to carry firearms; and

children.label: I
children.text: engagement in or supervision of the prevention, detection, investigation, or prosecution of, or the incarceration of any person for, any violation of law; or

children.label: II
children.text: the protection of Federal, State, local, or foreign government officials against threats to personal safety; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes a law enforcement officer employed by the Amtrak Police Department or Federal Reserve.

children.heading: Office
children.label: 6 Office
children.text: The term “Office” means the Congressional Badge of Bravery Office established under .section 50331(a) of this title

children.heading: State and Local Board
children.label: 7 State and Local Board
children.text: The term “State and Local Board” means the State and Local Law Enforcement Congressional Badge of Bravery Board established under .section 50323(a) of this title

children.heading: State and Local Board members
children.label: 8 State and Local Board members
children.text: The term “State and Local Board members” means the members of the State and Local Board appointed under .section 50323(c) of this title

children.heading: State and Local Law Enforcement Badge
children.label: 9 State and Local Law Enforcement Badge
children.text: The term “State and Local Law Enforcement Badge” means the State and Local Law Enforcement Congressional Badge of Bravery described in .section 50321 of this title

children.heading: State or local agency head
children.label: 10 State or local agency head
children.text: The term “State or local agency head” means the head of any executive, legislative, or judicial branch entity of a State or local government that employs State or local law enforcement officers.

children.heading: State or local law enforcement officer
children.label: 11 State or local law enforcement officer
A
children.text: who has statutory authority to make arrests or apprehensions;

children.label: B
children.text: who is authorized by the agency of the employee to carry firearms; and

children.label: i
children.text: engagement in or supervision of the prevention, detection, investigation, or prosecution of, or the incarceration of any person for, any violation of law; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the protection of Federal, State, local, or foreign government officials against threats to personal safety.
